summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CursorCode AI platform - found and fixed 1 critical bug (missing Sparkles import in ProjectPage), all features working correctly including auth flows, project management, AI generation (demo mode), and deployment

minor.issue: Returns 500 when GitHub OAuth credentials not configured

issues: Text shows 'advanced models like 2.' - seems to be truncated or placeholder text

passed_tests: Frontend: Landing page loads with hero, features, pricing sections
Frontend: Navigation buttons work (Login, Signup, Get Started)
Frontend: Watch Demo button opens modal
Frontend: Login flow authenticates and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Signup flow creates account and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows sidebar, projects, credits
Frontend: Project workspace loads with AI Generator (FIXED - was broken)
Frontend: Settings page loads with Account/Billing/API tabs
Frontend: Pricing page shows all 5 plans with prices
Frontend: Logout redirects to login page

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing 'Sparkles' import from lucide-react causing runtime error
bugs_fixed.fix: Added Sparkles to the lucide-react import statement

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
API endpoints handle demo mode correctly when external APIs not configured
seed_data_creation: Created test user and test projects via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. ProjectPage was fixed (missing Sparkles import). Demo mode works correctly when XAI_API_KEY, Stripe, SendGrid not configured. GitHub OAuth requires credentials to test fully. Focus on edge cases or specific user flows if needed.
mocked_apis_note: xAI Grok AI generation (returns demo responses), Stripe payments (returns demo URLs), SendGrid email (logs warning and skips), GitHub OAuth (returns error if not configured) - all working as expected in demo mode
